description.zh-Hans: 从参考图提取代表性色板并迁移到当前素材，同时可保留原始明暗层次。
description.en: Extracts a representative palette from a reference and applies it while preserving source luminance.

triggers.zh-Hans: 参考图配色, 匹配色板, 统一素材颜色, 风格参考
triggers.en: reference palette, match colors, unify asset palette, style reference

exampleUsage.zh-Hans: 主素材接图像端口，同系列素材接风格参考端口。
exampleUsage.en: Connect the subject to Image and a matching asset to Style Reference.
